title: ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: HILLTOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Referral and coordination of adult outpatient services through Intensive Care Coordination. Adult outpatient services work with adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focuses on wellness recovery, solution-focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD). 998 Library Court Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm Email (503) 655-8401 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8401 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. State General Fund for individuals who are uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLTOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER
